title: Change Status if Email gets sent

posts.author: TjeuGrambutler (Tjeu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I tried to look for this automation but haven’t been able to figure it out yet.

Is it possible the change status based on if a specific email gets sent.

For example if and email is sent from my Gmail (Containing XYZ in the title) set email status to ‘‘sent’’

Looking forward to your replies

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TjeuGrambutler ,

You can easily do this by using Make. It is possible in Make that to change status based on if a specific email gets sent.
